cards.name: Sarn Ford
cards.quote: Sarn Ford keeps the westward road under a watchful current, where no crossing is ever wholly forgotten.

cards.name: Eagle's Eyrie
cards.quote: Eagle's Eyrie clings to the heights like a watchful thought that refuses the dark.

cards.name: Dawn
cards.actionEffect: Grants Courage to all Free People units for 1 turn and dispels Doors of Night.

cards.name: Stars
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Hope to all Elves for 1 turn.

cards.name: Durin's Day
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Hope to all Dwarves for 1 turn.

cards.name: Sun
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all Humans and Hobbits for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked units.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hidden artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 Mage for 1 turn.

cards.name: AriseRidersOfTheoden
cards.actionEffect: Allied cavalry units in radius 2 gain Haste (1 turn) and Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: AmonSul remembers every road that has passed beneath its shadow.

cards.name: Annuminas
cards.quote: At Annuminas, the plain lies wide and unhidden, like a thought too large to keep to oneself.

cards.name: CarasCelairnen
cards.quote: CarasCelairnen holds a hush like still water, bright with Elven memory beneath the leaves.

cards.name: Edhellond
cards.quote: Edhellond endures as a broken haven, and the sea still whispers of the ships that once knew it.

cards.name: FornostErain
cards.quote: FornostErain lies open to the wind, a crown of ruins that the North has not bothered to hide.

cards.name: Forochel
cards.quote: Forochel lies under a hard sky, where even silence seems to wear fur and frost.

cards.name: GladdenFields
cards.quote: Across GladdenFields, wind and distance move freely, as if the land itself were watching the march.

cards.name: LondDaerEnedh
cards.quote: LondDaerEnedh leans against the river like an old Númenórean dream that refused to die.

cards.name: Lake Town Arsenal
cards.quote: AmonSul keeps a ruin's stern dignity, and the hill remembers every storm.

cards.name: Under Elendil's Banner
cards.actionEffect: Allied Humans and Dunedain in radius 2 gain Hope and Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: The Power of Nenya
cards.actionEffect: Target allied PC: hide it for 2 turns and grant Courage to nearby allied units.

cards.name: Lorien Belt
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: Hidden (2 turns) and Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: BountyfulSeason
cards.actionEffect: Gain +2 Gold, +1 Timber, +1 Leather.

cards.name: Caravans
cards.actionEffect: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra gold versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Woven by the Galadhrim
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: gain Haste (1 turn) and Hidden (2 turns).

cards.name: Stand of Dol Amroth
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: On the Pelennor
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: that army gains Courage (2 turns), and if it contains cavalry it also gains Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: The Power of Vilya
cards.actionEffect: Allied characters in radius 1 are fully healed, and Foam on the Water is cast in radius 2-4 depending on the caster's Mage level.

cards.name: DreamsOfNumenor
cards.actionEffect: All allied units on shore/water-adjacent tiles gain Haste and Courage (1 turn).

cards.name: The Beorning Toll
cards.actionEffect: Fortify the caster for 1 turn and halt enemy units in the same or adjacent hexes.

cards.name: Ancient Edge
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn) and Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the surrounding area in a radius based on the higher of Agent or Commander skill, detect nearby enemies, and halt an enemy army commander in your hex if present.

cards.name: Arrows of the Galadhrim
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: deal moderate damage and, if the target is on forest terrain, apply Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Ambush from Edhellond
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage; if the caster is Hidden, also apply Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and gain 2 gold.

cards.name: Rain
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: remove Burning from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: FirstLightOnTheThirdDay
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: grant Courage (1 turn) and Hope (1 turn) to all Human and Dunedain units within radius 3.

cards.name: FordOfBruinen
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: allied units on shore/water tiles in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), allied non-army characters there gain Hidden (1 turn), and enemy units there are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Swift as the Galadhrim
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn), Hidden (1 turn), and if on a forest tile also remove Fear.

cards.name: Treasures of Lasgalen
cards.actionEffect: All allied Elf characters in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn), and one wounded allied character in your hex heals a moderate amount.

cards.name: The Horn Calls
cards.actionEffect: All allied Human and Dunedain units in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), and enemy units in your hex gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Shielded
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and if the target has Fear remove it.

cards.name: War spoils
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: Set Out at Once
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn) and Hidden (1 turn).

cards.name: Bound in Hithlain
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn), and if on a forest or mountain tile also gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Mounts
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: Token of the Woodland Realm
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn).

cards.name: Provided by the Elves
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (3 turns).

cards.name: Northmen Stand Firm
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.actionEffect: All naval or embarked units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: A Light in Dark Places
cards.actionEffect: All allied units in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and lose Fear/Despair.

cards.name: Behind Noldo Shields
cards.actionEffect: All allied elves in radius 1 gain Fortified (1 turn) and lose Fear.

cards.name: Gift of the Evenstar
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character gains Hope (2 turns) and removes Fear/Despair.

cards.name: Healing Herbs
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned/Burning.

cards.name: Heir to Barahir
cards.actionEffect: Allied Humans/Dunedain in radius 1 gain Hope (1 turn); caster gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).

cards.name: Hope Reborn
cards.actionEffect: Remove negative status effects in an area of 2 hexes from caster.

cards.name: Heart of the Mountain
cards.actionEffect: At a mountain or population center, allied Dwarf commanders in your hex and adjacent hexes gain Fortified (1) and Strengthened (1); enemy commanders there gain Fear (1).

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted (1 turn); caster gains Hidden (2 turns).

cards.name: Joining the Rangers
cards.actionEffect: Allied Dunedain in radius 2 gain Courage (1 turn), and the caster scouts radius 2.

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Reclaiming Erebor
cards.actionEffect: Allied Dwarves in radius 2 gain Hope (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.actionEffect: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Silmarilion
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain ArcaneInsight (1 turn), and your next FindArtifact here is easier.

cards.name: TheAwakeningOfTheoden
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: permanently gain +1 Commander, remove Fear, and gain Courage (2 turns).

cards.name: TheGreyCompany
cards.quote: Forochel lies white and severe at the world's edge, where cold becomes its own law.

cards.name: Traps
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked (1 turn) and Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: TrollsHoard
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex gains Fortified (1 turn) and Strengthened (1 turn); your nation gains +1 gold and +1 mithril.

cards.name: VisionsOfTolEressea
cards.actionEffect: Target allied Elf in your hex gains ArcaneInsight (1 turn).

cards.name: Well-equiped Army
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: Kindle Dawnfire
cards.actionEffect: Kindle Dawnfire. Unique event logic variant based on Dawn.

cards.name: Ward Against the Eye
cards.actionEffect: Ward Against the Eye. Unique event logic variant based on VisionsOfTolEressea.

cards.name: Steward's Muster
cards.actionEffect: Steward's Muster. Unique event logic variant based on RalliedMen.

cards.name: Hallow the Road
cards.actionEffect: Hallow the Road. Unique event logic variant based on GoingOnAnAdventure.

cards.name: Oath of the Westfold
cards.actionEffect: Oath of the Westfold. Unique event logic variant based on FirstLightOnTheThirdDay.

cards.name: Release Character
cards.actionEffect: Release one captive currently held by this character in the same hex.

cards.name: Ask Ransom
cards.actionEffect: Demand ransom for a captive in the same hex. If the captive's owner pays, the captive is released.

cards.name: Free Character
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to free an allied captive of the same nation in the same hex. Enemy agents hold captives more securely, and critical failure is dangerous.

cards.name: Hobbiton
cards.quote: The green about Hobbiton has the soft look of peace and the hard heart of vigilance.

cards.name: Buckland
cards.quote: At Buckland, the evening stillness is tended like a lamp in a window.

cards.name: Michel Delving
cards.quote: Michel Delving is small to the eye, yet the brave have long found it a stout refuge.

cards.name: Imladris
cards.quote: In Imladris, the hush is so deep that even grief learns to tread softly.

cards.name: Bree
cards.quote: Bree’s old hill-country keeps a wary peace, half-farm and half-waystation for those who know the roads.
